# Style DNA

## One Line

Pure white, minimal, hand-drawn, generous white space, restrained, absurd, product-sketch feeling, handwritten annotation feeling, clear structure but not instructional.

Like a quick explanatory sketch drawn on blank paper by someone who has been working in AI, product, design, and dev tools for a long time.

## Required

- 16:9 horizontal inline illustration.
- Pure white background: no off-white, warm gray, paper texture, gradients, shadows, noise, or vintage paper feel.
- Black hand-drawn line art as the primary style: thin lines, slight wobble, not mechanical, not vector, not heavy outline.
- Generous white space: main subject occupies about 40%-60% of the canvas, at least 35% blank space, ideally one large quiet area.
- Sparse handwritten annotations: maximum 5-8 labels, each ideally 2-6 words.
- One image, one core action / structure / state / metaphor.
- Structure should express itself naturally — do not write the structure type name on the image.

## Colors

- Black: main line art, character, frames, structures, primary text, main objects.
- Orange: primary flow, paths, arrows, automation flow, A-to-B movement.
- Red: key annotations, problems, emotional points, critical warnings, results.
- Blue: supplementary notes, internal states, system states, secondary explanations, AI/assistant/automation hints.

Blue is not required in every image. Use color with restraint — less is more.

## Absolute Prohibitions

- No commercial illustration.
- No PPT infographic.
- No formal flowchart.
- No course slide deck.
- No cute cartoon poster.
- No children's illustration.
- No complex architecture diagram.
- No polished flat illustration.
- No tech-style UI.
- No real app screenshots.
- No complex backgrounds, gradients, shadows, or textures.
- Do not explain every node in detail.
- Do not write "Workflow / System Architecture / Common Pitfalls / Roadmap" or similar type labels in the top-left corner.

## Aesthetic Direction

Absurd, creative, interesting, clean and fresh, imaginative.

Not cute, not childish, not overly complex, not rigid.
